subjects.description: A small child wearing a bright red hooded jacket and dark jeans, stepping off the roadside to cross the rural-hamlet street directly in the vehicle's path
subjects.appearance_details: Carries a small backpack, wears sneakers; the red jacket glowing warmly against the deepening dusk
subjects.relationship: The pedestrian hazard that prompts the ego vehicle to brake; the central reason for the deceleration event
subjects.location: Center foreground, crossing from right sidewalk into the road
subjects.orientation: Profile view, facing left as the child walks across the road
subjects.pose: Mid-stride, one leg forward, arms slightly swinging while walking
subjects.action: Steps off the sidewalk and begins crossing the road
subjects.state_changes: Moves from curb into roadway, continuing across the vehicle's path and pausing briefly mid-road
subjects.clothing: Bright red hooded jacket, dark jeans, sneakers, small backpack
subjects.expression: Unaware and casual, looking ahead across the street
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Light tan, smooth youthful skin warmed by the dusk glow
subjects.facial_features: Round face, short brown hair, small features

subjects.description: A few parked pickups and older cars along the gravel-edged curbs of the rural-hamlet street
subjects.appearance_details: Weathered pickups and older sedans in muted colors, warm dusk glow along their upper panels
subjects.relationship: Part of the residential environment; potential occlusion that hides the child until they step out
subjects.location: Left and right midground along the curbs
subjects.orientation: Parallel-parked, facing toward and away from camera along the road edges

background_setting: A rural-hamlet residential street on rolling North American hills at dusk in autumn. A cluster of farmhouses and cottages with porches sits among fields and turning trees along a two-lane dry-asphalt road that rises and dips with the land. A few parked pickups and older cars line the gravel-edged curbs; simple sidewalks or verges run beside the homes. The warm dusk sky fades from amber at the horizon to deep blue overhead, the last light warming the hills over the faded center markings.

lighting.conditions: Clear autumn dusk fading from warm to blue
lighting.direction: Low warm horizon glow from the west giving way to cool overhead twilight
lighting.shadows: Long, soft dusk shadows fading as the warm light dims toward blue
lighting.illumination_effect: Warm-to-blue transitional dusk light over the hills; the child's red jacket glows warmly against the deepening twilight

aesthetics.composition: Centered forward-facing ego perspective with the road vanishing toward the horizon, child positioned in the central lane, parked cars framing the sides
aesthetics.color_scheme: Amber horizon fading to deep blue, warm autumn fields and turning trees, dark asphalt, and a glowing red accent from the child's jacket
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Quiet, warm rural-dusk calm heightened by sudden caution
aesthetics.patterns: Rolling hills and fields, a few parked pickups, farmhouses and turning trees along the road

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward-moving ego dashcam motion that decelerates and comes to a complete stop
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from the driver's viewpoint
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the road and crossing child against the fading dusk horizon

context: Autonomous driving or ADAS demonstration of pedestrian detection and emergency braking in a residential setting

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels forward at a moderate speed down the rural-hamlet residential street on the rolling hills at dusk.
A small child in a red jacket steps off the right roadside and begins crossing into the vehicle's path.
The ego vehicle promptly applies firm, controlled braking on the dry asphalt, decelerating as the nose dips slightly.
The vehicle reaches a complete stop well before the child and remains fully stopped while the child continues across.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: White painted text on the dry asphalt, partially faded, dim and warm-tinted in the fading dusk light
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the road surface ahead, visible in the center of frame throughout
text_and_signage_elements.context: Traffic calming marking indicating a low-speed residential zone

segments.description: Ego vehicle cruises forward over the rolling rural-hamlet road at dusk, farmhouses and parked pickups against the amber-to-blue sky.
segments.key_changes: Steady forward motion at moderate speed
segments.camera: Forward dashcam motion, smooth and steady

segments.description: A child steps off the roadside into the road; the vehicle begins firm, controlled braking and decelerates rapidly in the fading light.
segments.key_changes: Hazard appears; speed drops sharply, nose dips under braking
segments.camera: Forward motion slowing, slight forward pitch from deceleration

segments.description: The vehicle comes to a complete stop well before the child and holds stationary as the child crosses safely against the dusk.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle fully stopped and held stationary

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam moves forward down a rural-hamlet residential street on rolling hills at dusk, an amber horizon fading to blue past farmhouses and a few parked pickups. By 0:01 a small child in a bright red jacket steps off the right roadside and begins crossing directly ahead. From 0:01 to 0:03 the ego vehicle applies firm, controlled braking, slowing with a slight forward pitch in the fading dusk light. By 0:03 the vehicle has stopped completely well before the child, and from 0:03 to 0:05 it holds stationary while the child crosses safely.
audio_description: Quiet rural-dusk sounds of crickets and a distant dog, the hum of the vehicle over dry asphalt, then firm tire and brake friction as it decelerates, settling into a quiet idle with evening crickets.
